name: AdOff 13 - YouTube Publisher (meta LLM + upload API)

parameters.query: SELECT job_id, lang, title_hint, LEFT(COALESCE(transcript,''),6000) AS tr, COALESCE(video_b_path,'') AS vb, COALESCE(video_a_path,'') AS va FROM adoff_autopilot.youtube_queue WHERE status='done' AND published=false ORDER BY completed_at LIMIT 2;
